new_posts.title: Fix with Copilot for failing Actions now in Pro, Pro+, and Max
new_posts.summary:
When a GitHub Actions job fails, Copilot Pro, Pro+, and Max subscribers can now ask Copilot cloud agent to fix it in one click. Click the Fix with Copilot button…

The post

new_posts.title: Agent tasks REST API now available for Copilot Pro, Pro+, and Max
new_posts.summary: Copilot Pro, Pro+, and Max users can now programmatically start and track Copilot cloud agent tasks with the Agent tasks REST API, available in public preview. Copilot cloud agent works…

new_posts.title: Larger context windows and configurable reasoning levels for GitHub Copilot
new_posts.summary: GitHub Copilot now supports larger context windows and configurable reasoning levels to help you tackle deeper, more complex work. Leverage one-million-token context windows A one-million-token con

new_posts.title: Copilot Chat brings richer context to pull requests

new_posts.title: GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code, May releases
new_posts.summary: VS Code continues with weekly stable releases. This changelog covers releases v1.120 through v1.123, the releases we shipped throughout May and early June 2026. In May, we made the Agents…

new_posts.title: GPT-4.1 deprecated
new_posts.summary: We have deprecated GPT-4.1 across all GitHub Copilot experiences (including Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions), June 1, 2026. Model Deprecation date Suggested al

new_posts.title: Expanded technical preview availability for the GitHub Copilot app
new_posts.summary: The GitHub Copilot app technical preview is now available to all existing Copilot Pro, Pro+, Business, and Enterprise customers. Download the Copilot app for Windows, macOS, or Linux to get…<

new_posts.title: GitHub Copilot app: The agent-native desktop experience
new_posts.summary:
At Microsoft Build 2026, GitHub introduced new tools, updates, and surfaces so agents can work the way you already work.

The post

new_posts.title: Copilot SDK is now generally available
new_posts.summary: The GitHub Copilot SDK is now generally available. You can embed GitHub Copilot’s agentic engine into your own applications, services, and developer tools with a stable API and production-rea
